req.title: Hr-Admin updates onboarding-task
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to update a onboarding-task through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-026 requires an authenticated hr-admin to update onboarding-tasks via UI form with mandatory field validation, audit logging, and proper HTTP response codes. The test suite covers: (1) positive case validating successful update with audit record, (2) negative cases for validation errors and authorization failures, and (3) boundary cases for field length limits. Tests follow ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119-4 heuristics (EP, BVA, NEG, DT) and are self-contained, deterministic, and idempotent.

tests.name: test_hr_admin_updates_onboarding_task_success
preconditions: Valid hr-admin auth token in session
actions: Update title field to 'Updated Task Title'
expected: Response body contains updated entity id
Audit log entry created with action=update, actor=hr-admin, timestamp recorded
trace: Expected outcomes: onboarding-task is updated; audit record written; response 200 or 201

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_missing_mandatory_field_validation_error
preconditions: Valid hr-admin auth token in session
expected: Response body contains validation error message
trace: R-WEB-026: Error pathways: 400 on validation error
tests.executable:
def test_hr_admin_update_missing_mandatory_field_validation_error(client, auth_token_hr_admin):
    task_id = 'task-002'
    payload = {
        'title': '',
        'description': 'Valid description',
        'assigned_to': 'user-456',
        'due_date': '2025-12-31'
    }
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token_hr_admin}'}
    resp = client.put(
        f'/onboarding-tasks/{task_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    assert 'title' in resp.json()['error'].lower()
    original = <helper_fn_get_task>(task_id)
    assert original['title'] != ''

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_unauthenticated_forbidden
actions: Submit update payload without auth token
expected: Response body contains authentication error message
tests.executable:
def test_hr_admin_update_unauthenticated_forbidden(client):
    task_id = 'task-003'
    payload = {
        'title': 'Updated Title',
        'description': 'Updated description',
        'assigned_to': 'user-789',
        'due_date': '2025-12-31'
    }
    resp = client.put(
        f'/onboarding-tasks/{task_id}',
        json=payload
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    assert 'unauthorized' in resp.json()['error'].lower()

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_insufficient_role_permission_denied
preconditions: Valid standard_user auth token in session
actions: Submit update payload with standard_user auth token
expected: Response body contains permission error message
trace: R-WEB-026: Error pathways: 403 if role forbidden

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_title_at_max_boundary
preconditions: Valid hr-admin auth token in session
Title field max length is 255 characters
expected: onboarding-task record updated with full 255-character title
trace: R-WEB-026: Mandatory fields must be validated
Boundary Value Analysis: title field at maximum allowed length
tests.executable:
def test_hr_admin_update_title_at_max_boundary(client, auth_token_hr_admin):
    task_id = 'task-005'
    max_title = 'A' * 255
    payload = {
        'title': max_title,
        'description': 'Valid description',
        'assigned_to': 'user-111',
        'due_date': '2025-12-31'
    }
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token_hr_admin}'}
    resp = client.put(
        f'/onboarding-tasks/{task_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code in [200, 201]
    updated = <helper_fn_get_task>(task_id)
    assert updated['title'] == max_title

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_title_exceeds_max_boundary
preconditions: Valid hr-admin auth token in session
Title field max length is 255 characters
expected: Response body contains validation error about title length
trace: R-WEB-026: Mandatory fields must be validated
Boundary Value Analysis: title field exceeds maximum allowed length
tests.executable:
def test_hr_admin_update_title_exceeds_max_boundary(client, auth_token_hr_admin):
    task_id = 'task-006'
    over_max_title = 'A' * 256
    payload = {
        'title': over_max_title,
        'description': 'Valid description',
        'assigned_to': 'user-222',
        'due_date': '2025-12-31'
    }
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token_hr_admin}'}
    resp = client.put(
        f'/onboarding-tasks/{task_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    assert 'length' in resp.json()['error'].lower()

tests.name: test_hr_admin_update_invalid_due_date_format
preconditions: Valid hr-admin auth token in session
expected: Response body contains validation error about date format
trace: R-WEB-026: Mandatory fields must be validated
